expected_failure_modes: Premature tilting penalty causes agent to avoid any tilt, maybe hindering learned control.
Landing success event too strict may cause rare reward and slow learning.
Stability reward may encourage soft landing but could be gamed by bouncing on one leg.
risk_notes: Weight balancing is critical; too high control cost may prevent exploration.
Dense guidance could conflict with stability reward during contact phase.
Event condition thresholds may need tuning based on actual system dynamics.
